<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
update to ClimaAtmos v0.19.0, ClimaLSM v0.5.0. also updates to julia v1.10

wait to merge until #538 is fixed (see https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCore.jl/issues/1589)

closes #554 (dependency updates)
closes #547 (julia v1.10 update)
closes #538 (MPI hang)
supersedes #549 
supersedes #550 
supersedes #558 

## To-do
- [x] ClimaLSM breaking changes
- [x] ClimaAtmos breaking changes (none)
- [x] change branch protection rule for main: ci 1.9 -> ci 1.10
title: dependency updates
